commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5e8e95ec71834cac88b45152726078f1cafd35ec)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Windows sqlite-vec retry without the `.dll` suffix, focused loader tests, and a release changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +80, Docs +1. Total +111 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence maintainer-run reproduction is available in this read-only review. Source inspection plus the contributor's copied Windows terminal proof make the reported `.dll` load failure plausible, but the review did not run Windows live proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining repair is narrow and mechanical: rebase the Windows retry into the current sqlite-vec loader while preserving main's fallback and verification behavior.

target.title: fix: retry sqlite-vec load without .dll suffix on Windows
target.author: justincache

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
